sector_summary: The Healthcare sector (XLV) shows high confidence and strong relative strength, making it a top choice. Energy (XLE) and Industrials (XLI) have medium confidence with positive signals, while Technology (XLK) is also performing well but lacks momentum acceleration. Consumer Discretionary (XLY), Communication Services (XLC), and Consumer Staples (XLP) are sectors to avoid due to negative price momentum and conflicting news signals.
